children.heading: Plans under section 7514(a)
children.label: a Plans under section 7514(a)
children.text: Implementation plans required under shall provide for attainment of the relevant primary standard as expeditiously as practicable but no later than 5 years from the date of the nonattainment designation.section 7514(a) of this title

children.heading: Plans under section 7514(b)
children.label: b Plans under section 7514(b)
children.text: Implementation plans required under shall provide for attainment of the relevant primary national ambient air quality standard within 5 years after .section 7514(b) of this titleNovember 15, 1990

children.heading: Inadequate plans
children.label: c Inadequate plans
children.text: Implementation plans for nonattainment areas for sulfur oxides or nitrogen dioxide with plans that were approved by the Administrator before , but, subsequent to such approval, were found by the Administrator to be substantially inadequate, shall provide for attainment of the relevant primary standard within 5 years from the date of such finding.November 15, 1990
